label: P&L Estimate
description: Buy notional, sell notional, gas estimate, and net P&L estimate via KpiStrip with factor breakdown.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 availableOn=[bundles]. 0.4 No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 No mock imports in widget file. 0.6 N/A — context is pure local state (no async fetch); no isLoading field. 0.7 Empty state present (steps.length===0 guard with informative message). 0.8 N/A — context has no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary handles render errors. 0.9 No dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data sourced from useBundlesData() hook (steps, totalCost, totalRevenue, estimatedGas, netPnl). 1.2 Context calls useGlobalScope() and derives hasDefiDesk from org scope. 1.3 Org filter adjusts scoped templates; P&L values derive from steps (no direct org filtering needed for P&L display). 1.4-1.5 N/A — P&L is a derived display widget; client/strategy cascade not applicable. 1.6 Empty org scope → hasDefiDesk=true → no restriction. 1.7 Reference data in lib/config/services/bundle.config — correct location.
